task_completion.description: Verify that a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Web Archive Research' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Firefox bookmarks sidebar, toolbar, or library window showing a folder specifically named 'Web Archive Research'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the bookmark folder contains bookmarks for the Wayback Machine snapshots of the five target websites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look inside the 'Web Archive Research' folder in Firefox; there should be five bookmarks pointing to web.archive.org URLs for google.com, amazon.com, wikipedia.org, youtube.com, and twitter.com.

task_completion.description: Verify that the JSON report file has been created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal displaying a file named 'web_history_report.json' located in the ~/Documents/ directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the JSON report includes all five websites with the required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the contents of the JSON file. It must have top-level keys for 'google.com', 'amazon.com', 'wikipedia.org', 'youtube.com', and 'twitter.com'. Each must contain the sub-keys 'earliest_capture_date', 'wayback_url', and 'description'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the earliest capture dates in the JSON report match the actual Wayback Machine historical data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the 'earliest_capture_date' values in the JSON. Google should be 1998-11-11, Amazon should be 1998-12-12, Wikipedia should be 2001-07-27, YouTube should be 2005-04-28, and Twitter should be late 2006 (September or later).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a web browser to access the Wayback Machine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Firefox open and navigating to web.archive.org, rather than just a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure bookmarks were created using the browser interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Firefox bookmark star being highlighted or the bookmark management UI being used, rather than editing SQLite bookmark files directly via terminal.

integrity.description: Ensure the JSON file was typed or constructed based on findings, not just copy-pasted from a pre-existing script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The JSON file should be open in an editor, and the descriptions should look like they were written by the agent based on the actual page content.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The actual earliest Wayback Machine captures are: Google (1998-11-11), Amazon (1998-12-12), Wikipedia (2001-07-27), YouTube (2005-04-28), and Twitter (September 2006 or later). Note that while Amazon was founded in 1995, its earliest Wayback capture is December 12, 1998.
